name: Fast Wind Shift
description: Simulates a rapid wind direction change from SW to NW mid-evacuation, stressing route viability on the eastern corridors.

name: Night Evacuation
description: Low-visibility nighttime scenario with calm winds but higher civilian delay due to reduced awareness and road congestion.

name: School Zone
description: Ignition near Paradise schools during pickup hours. High population density with many vulnerable evacuees and limited road capacity.
